tasks.title: Analyze Claude Code competitor
tasks.description: Review the Claude Code source code located at ../claude-code-sourcemap. Analyze its architecture, key features, UI/UX patterns, capabilities, and unique differentiators. Document findings in a structured format including: core features, technical approach, strengths, and gaps. Output a JSON file to target/temp/swarmout/claude-code-analysis.json with your findings.

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode competitor
tasks.description: Review the OpenCode source code located at ../opencode. Analyze its architecture, key features, UI/UX patterns, capabilities, and unique differentiators. Document findings in a structured format including: core features, technical approach, strengths, and gaps. Output a JSON file to target/temp/swarmout/opencode-analysis.json with your findings.

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot CLI competitor
tasks.description: Research and document Copilot CLI's features, capabilities, command-line interface design, integration patterns, and user experience. Since source code may not be available, use public documentation, GitHub repos, and API specifications. Document findings in a structured format including: core features, CLI commands, strengths, and gaps. Output a JSON file to target/temp/swarmout/copilot-cli-analysis.json with your findings.

tasks.title: Analyze Roocode competitor
tasks.description: Research and document Roocode's features, capabilities, architecture, UI/UX patterns, and unique selling points. Use public documentation, GitHub repos, and product information. Document findings in a structured format including: core features, technical approach, strengths, and gaps. Output a JSON file to target/temp/swarmout/roocode-analysis.json with your findings.

tasks.title: Review current product
tasks.description: Conduct a comprehensive review of the current product. Document its existing features, architecture, capabilities, limitations, and current user experience. Create a detailed assessment of what the product currently does well and where it lacks functionality compared to industry standards. Output findings as target/temp/swarmout/current-product-analysis.json.

tasks.title: Synthesize analyses and generate feature recommendations
tasks.description: Wait for all competitor analyses (s1, s2, s3, s4) and current product review (s5) to complete. Read all JSON analysis files from target/temp/swarmout/. Compare the current product against each competitor, identify feature gaps, and consolidate unique features that competitors have but the current product lacks. Generate a comprehensive list of recommended feature additions with rationale. Output as target/temp/swarmout/feature-recommendations.json.

tasks.title: Create implementation plan with milestones
tasks.description: Read the feature-recommendations.json file. Prioritize recommended features based on impact, feasibility, and strategic value. Create a detailed implementation plan that includes: feature prioritization rationale, milestone breakdown (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 or similar), specific implementation tasks for each milestone, resource requirements, and risk assessment. Organize the plan in a clear structure with dependencies between tasks. Output as target/temp/swarmout/implementation-plan.json.

tasks.title: Generate final SWARMOUT2.md document
tasks.description: Read all analysis files and the implementation plan. Create the final comprehensive SWARMOUT2.md document at target/temp/swarmout/SWARMOUT2.md. Structure it with: Executive Summary, Current Product Overview, Competitive Landscape Analysis (section for each competitor), Feature Gap Analysis, Recommended Features (with business rationale), Implementation Plan with Milestones and Tasks (organized by priority/timeline), Risk Assessment, and Conclusion. Use clear formatting, tables, and hierarchical structure for readability.
